creator: rometravelers
caption:
Rome is full of history and culture. The Colosseum is one of the most famous landmarks, standing as a symbol of ancient Rome by @anna.shengeliaa ✨❤️ Send this to your favorite traveling partner! 🤩

💡Rome’s streets, piazzas, and fountains are full of stories. Walking around, you can feel the mix of history and everyday life.

transcription.text: Baby, baby, baby, I'm coming home to your tender arms.
